candidate_name: Auxiliary Supervision Sensitivity and Alignment Probe
reason_training_not_allowed: This file freezes the non-training Gate-0 protocol only. It does not grant permission to run seed42 smoke. Smoke requires all active Gate-0 candidates to finish, a Feasible-A/B status, and a separate FROZEN_SMOKE manifest.

repo.working_tree_note: Remote working tree contains uncommitted compatibility and experiment patches in main.py, run.py, model/PANDA.py, and utils/utils.py; protocol is based on the observed live working tree, not only commit 03e4c00.
repo.default_model_name_warning: main.py defaults to clean_vib; every PANDA run must explicitly pass --model_name FTmodel.

gate0_freeze.purpose: Freeze non-training checks, code-gap requirements, allowed artifacts, active candidate set, and promotion rules.
allowed_actions: audit source paths and tensor availability
design minimal R6-A code changes and runner outputs
run non-training syntax/import/interface checks after code is edited
forbidden_actions: choose primary variant from stdout-only metrics

blocked_until: R6-A status is Feasible-A or Feasible-B
round6_r6a_smoke_manifest.json is created with status FROZEN_SMOKE
the smoke manifest repeats train/val-only and no-test constraints

data_policy.test_may_be_used_only_for: final confirmatory evaluation after all active candidates are gated, one primary config is selected by three-seed val, and a confirmatory-test manifest is frozen

allowed_artifacts.purpose: R5-A smoke protocol and variant inventory
R5-A No-Go decision and best-control relationship
R5-A variant metrics for aux-weight anchor and controls
R5-A flip audit; confirms image_project net-negative and aux_weight_2p0 weak net-positive signal
Existing branch/final gradient telemetry for non-training R6-A feasibility analysis
Round 5 Gate-0 deep-review constraints and downgraded mechanism language
Train/val-only frozen feature protocol precedent and no-test policy

source_audit_facts: OpenPrompt fields are generated by dataloaders but dropped by clipdata2gpu before PANDA.forward.
Current text/image/fusion expert gates use task_num=2 and forward hardcodes index 0; they are not 9-domain experts.
PAD/GNS uses hard top-k source indices; DCA is late static prompt-to-prompt bias.
Trainer.test reports final metrics only; branch/flip/selector diagnostics require dedicated export tools.
R5-A image projection is No-Go; aux_weight_2p0 is only a candidate signal and control anchor.
Current code supports only global --aux_loss_weight for R6-A-like behavior.
R6-A branch-specific weights, aux schedules, detached/no-feature-update controls, random aux labels, and shuffled branch-label mapping are not yet implemented.

current_direct_support: global aux_loss_weight CLI and Trainer loss path
R5-A gradient telemetry and generic PCGrad/CAGrad/random-sign controls as references
required_before_smoke_manifest: add CLI/config/run/Trainer pass-through for branch-specific aux weights
add aux schedule mode and epoch/step schedule computation
add detached/no-feature-update aux control with explicit semantics
add train-only random aux label and shuffled branch-label mapping controls
add R6-A runner and summarizer that write manifest, notes, per-variant metrics JSON/CSV, flip audit, telemetry compact, and decision JSON
run py_compile/import/argparse sanity checks for all new R6-A CLI flags
not_acceptable_substitutions: do not use R3 regret shuffled mode as R6-A shuffled aux label control
do not use r5a_grad_mode=random_sign as random aux label control
do not treat aux_weight_2p0 as a primary method variant

r6a_variant_taxonomy_for_future_smoke.primary_family_rule: A future primary must be a schedule, branch-specific, final-aligned, or consistency mechanism and must beat best static aux/control. static_aux_weight_2p0 is never a primary.

feasible_a: primary beats best static aux sweep and aux_weight_2p0 anchor on Macro-F1 and accuracy
at least two support metrics among ECE/Brier/HCE/weak-domain do not degrade
feasible_b: final Macro-F1 and accuracy do not drop below deterministic_train_l0
mechanism signal exists, but improvement is below +0.003 or control moat is incomplete
candidate may be retained only as diagnostic, ablation, or second-stage fallback
diagnostic_only: review-risk language must be downgraded to auxiliary-supervision sensitivity

no_go_rule: primary below deterministic_train_l0 on final Macro-F1 or accuracy
primary not above best static aux/control variant
only calibration or conflict telemetry improves
random aux, shuffled branch labels, detached aux, or same-budget controls match the gain
any later seed validation falls below deterministic after promotion
blocked_rule: If required CLI flags, code paths, tensors, summaries, or allowed artifacts are missing, mark R6-A Blocked.
Blocked means do not train, record the missing path or tensor, and switch to the next active candidate Gate-0.
Do not paper over Blocked status by using R3/R5 controls as substitutes for R6-A mechanisms.

checkpoint_lifecycle.keep_until_decision: smoke checkpoints may be kept only until r6a_decision_summary.json is written
checkpoint_lifecycle.cleanup_trigger: No-Go decision written or R6-A demoted to diagnostic-only
checkpoint_lifecycle.no_go_cleanup: delete smoke checkpoints; keep manifest, notes, train/eval logs, summary csv/json/md, decision json, flip audit, telemetry compact, and per-variant eval metrics/csv
checkpoint_lifecycle.retention_exception_requires: Primary-Candidate decision id after all active candidates are gated and deep-validated
checkpoint_lifecycle.public_sync_rule: do not push checkpoints, raw datasets, credentials, or complete SSH connection strings to the public log repository

promotion_rule: Protocol freeze is not smoke permission.
Run active_gate0_set candidates before any smoke training.
If R6-A is Blocked or No-Go, switch immediately to the next active candidate.
If R6-A is Feasible-A/B, mark it and continue Gate-0 for every other active candidate.
After All-Active-Gate0-Done, write a separate smoke manifest for selected Feasible candidates.
Only a FROZEN_SMOKE manifest may authorize seed42 5-epoch train/val-only smoke.
Only after all smoke runs finish may one candidate be selected for three-seed val.
Confirmatory test remains locked until three-seed val freezes the primary config.

blue_team_summary.source_path_audit: R6-A requires new CLI/config/run/Trainer parameters for branch weights, schedule, detach mode, and aux label controls; current code only supports global aux_loss_weight.
blue_team_summary.protocol_audit: Gate-0 and smoke must be split; active candidates must be explicit; aux_weight_2p0 must be a control anchor, not primary.
blue_team_summary.runner_audit: Future smoke must write manifest, notes, per-variant metrics JSON/CSV, summary, decision, flip audit, telemetry compact, and logs; stdout-only metrics are invalid.
blue_team_summary.review_audit: R6-A is high review-risk as ordinary aux loss weighting unless it beats static sweep, calibration, stacking, detached, random/shuffled, same-budget, and generic gradient controls.
